title: codonopsis meleagris
intro: Codonopsis meleagris, also known as the "Chinese winter jasmine" or "dang shen," is a type of flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the enhancement of the immune system, improved respiratory function, and increased endurance. Codonopsis meleagris is often prepared for herbal use through drying, processing into a powder, or making into tea, tablets, or capsules, and is commonly consumed in the form of traditional Chinese medicine.
